description: A crew needs to excavate a trench for a new pipeline. They must first get an excavation permit, which includes a check for underground utilities.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a new request for an 'Excavation Permit', attaching the drawing showing the trench location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent starts a new permit request with the required documentation.

nodes.task_description: The permit system automatically triggers a request to the 'Call Before You Dig' service to identify any buried utilities in the area.

expected_outcome.expected: A request is automatically sent to the utility locating service.

nodes.task_description: Once the utility locate is complete and the area is marked clear, get final approval for the permit from the site supervisor.

expected_outcome.expected: After receiving the all-clear, the agent routes the permit to the supervisor who provides the final signature.
